description.zh-Hans: 使用粒子模拟生成烟雾/蒸汽。粒子上升、膨胀并随风力漂移和湍流消退。由时间参数（0-1）驱动动画。像素艺术量化输出。输出图像和遮罩。
description.en: Generates smoke/steam using particle simulation. Particles rise, expand, and fade with wind drift and turbulence. Driven by a time parameter (0-1) for animation. Pixel-art quantized. Outputs image and mask.

triggers.zh-Hans: 烟雾, 烟, 蒸汽, 灰尘, 粒子效果, 爆炸
triggers.en: smoke, steam, mist, dust, particle, explosion

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成烟雾或蒸汽的粒子动画效果，随时间参数消散上升，可做爆炸或环境烟雾。
exampleUsage.en: Generates particle-based smoke or steam animation driven by a time parameter for explosions or environmental haze.
